name: emit event
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, OrderPlaced: function(s, e) { emit("notifications", "OrderNotification", { orderId: e.data.orderId }); return s; } })

name: emit with metadata
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Ping: function(s, e) { emit("out", "Pong", {}, { source: "test" }); return s; } })

name: linkTo event
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, OrderPlaced: function(s, e) { linkTo("all-orders", e); return s; } })

name: linkTo with metadata
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Ping: function(s, e) { linkTo("linked", e, { reason: "test" }); return s; } })

name: log output
source: fromAll().when({ TestEvent: function(s, e) { log("hello from projection"); return s; } })

name: multiple log calls
source: fromAll().when({ Ping: function(s, e) { log("first"); log("second"); log("third"); return s; } })

name: multiple emits per event
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Batch: function(s, e) { emit("out", "A", {}); emit("out", "B", {}); return s; } })

name: emit and log in same handler
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Ping: function(s, e) { log("processing"); emit("out", "Pong", {}); return s; } })

name: emit from partitioned projection
source: fromAll().foreachStream().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, OrderPlaced: function(s, e) { emit("all-orders", "OrderReceived", { stream: e.streamId }); return s; } })

name: no emits when handler does not emit
source: fromAll().when({ $init: function() { return {}; }, Ping: function(s, e) { return s; } })
